title: Piquant Sharp Kenyan Mushroom Skewers
description: A sour and snappy Kenyan dish featuring mushroom, perfect for a date night, made with beurre-monte and egg-free friendly ingredients. This recipe combines the flavors of Africa with a French twist.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together beurre-monte, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the mushrooms to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated mushrooms onto skewers, leaving a small space between each mushroom.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the mushrooms are tender and slightly charred.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
Serve with a side of roasted vegetables or a salad for a complete meal.
